meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS starter kit to Solve can't debug code (Beginner Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome can't debug code. A Beginner-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: SaaS Starter Kit to Solve Debugging Issues
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with bugs. Use this SaaS starter kit guide to ship faster, debug with AI, and impress clients using Antigravity and Claude Code tools.
content.answer_block: Debugging is the primary bottleneck for freelance velocity. By utilizing a pre-configured SaaS starter kit, you eliminate boilerplate errors and environment drift. Combining this with AI-driven debugging tools like Antigravity and Claude Code turns complex, multi-hour troubleshooting sessions into streamlined, automated workflows that guarantee production-ready code every time.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a terminal full of red text, the client deadline is breathing down your neck, and the logic error is buried somewhere in a spaghetti-code authentication module. It’s the classic developer nightmare: you’re paid to build, but you’re stuck playing detective in your own codebase.

But what if you didn't have to start from scratch? The secret to high-velocity freelancing isn't writing more code—it's writing less. By adopting a robust SaaS starter kit and leveraging AI agents to manage your technical debt, you transform your development process from a reactive struggle into a repeatable, high-margin machine.

steps.title: Bootstrap with a Production-Grade Starter Kit
steps.description: Select a starter kit that includes pre-configured Auth, Database, and Stripe integration to avoid common setup bugs.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure a SaaS starter kit with Next.js, Supabase, and Stripe, ensuring strict TypeScript types and modular error handling.

steps.title: Automated Environment Validation
steps.description: Ensure your local environment matches production to prevent 'it works on my machine' debugging cycles.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a validation script that checks for required environment variables and service connectivity before app launch.

steps.title: Isolate Bugs with AI-Assisted Tracing
steps.description: Use Claude Code to trace stack traces directly to the source file, bypassing manual searching.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current error stack trace and pinpoint the exact line of code causing the middleware failure.

steps.title: Implement Unit Test Generation
steps.description: Force the codebase to remain stable by generating tests for every new feature module.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Jest unit tests for the newly created user profile service, focusing on edge cases for null inputs.

steps.title: Refactor for Maintainability
steps.description: Refactor complex functions into readable components to reduce future debugging surface area.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the authentication logic into smaller, testable functions while preserving existing functionality.

pro_tips: Always maintain a 'golden state' branch that is tested and bug-free; revert to this before adding new features.
Use AI to generate documentation for your custom functions immediately after writing them; it forces clarity in your logic.
Avoid global state libraries unless strictly necessary; they are the #1 source of 'ghost' bugs in freelance projects.
Configure your IDE to show hidden characters and linting errors in real-time to catch syntax bugs before you even run the code.
When a bug persists, ask the AI to play 'Devil's Advocate' and explain why your code *should* fail, rather than just fixing it.
resources: SaaS Starter Kit Best Practices: https://saas-starter-guide.com
content.next_steps: Deploy your first MVP module to a staging environment and run a smoke test suite to confirm your new debugging workflow is operational.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting bugs dictate your income. Leverage the power of AI-first development to ship faster, eliminate technical debt, and scale your freelance business. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
